<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\UnknownValidationSolutionProvider as BaseUnknownValidationSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class UnknownValidationSolutionProvider extends BaseUnknownValidationSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
